steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The word yet immediately after the blank signals a contrast: something true will be contradicted. The transition word must set up this contrast by conceding or acknowledging what will be contradicted.

steps.title: Apply the concession
steps.content: Granted means “it's true that” and perfectly sets up the contrast with yet—it says, in effect, “Admittedly, decades passed and calculations improved, but paradoxically the meridian didn't change.” The other choices don't establish the concession-before-contrast pattern the text requires. That matches choice A — A is correct.
